creator: nuskooler@gmail.com
text:
`phttpget` enables pipeline mode any time it gets back a HTTP response v1.1+, which isn't really a great assumption. This causes it to get stuck when using `freebsd-update` for example.

Additional details here:
https://l33t.codes/2024/12/05/Updating-FreeBSD-and-Re-Inventing-the-Wheel/

And:
https://www.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/1h5v1lc/freebsdupdate_woes_updating_to_142release/
